content:
这件以新年灯会为主题的图鲁时装花费了我不少时间去结合角色本身的特质和节日主题，事实上绿色系和春节主题的搭配简直是令我头大（）我在这件时装的设计中尝试了比较偏向新国风的山水风格，因为图鲁本身的配色非常适配青绿山水，并且原皮的中性色使用也让我尝试了对于水墨画元素的使用。鲤鱼和铜钱，祥云装饰的围巾以及暖色的绫罗外套不知道会不会让大家感觉这是其他人送给幼王的新年礼物（至少我感觉他自己不会想着穿这些）。墨菲和米粒的灯笼非常可爱，希望大家多多支持深海组2.x再创辉煌。这里是莉迪亚，感谢你的观看和阅读，lofter和b站同名莉迪亚Lydiaaaa欢迎关注不怎么发东西的私人up，爱你们。
PS：突然发现好像是只要P图就可以……但是我真的很认真做了服设……这真的可以吗，总之不安desu了

thread_title: ［為喚醒體換新裝］图鲁 灯会主题新年皮 含服设和简单二分立绘思路

content: 英文设计思路：This set of cloth is based on the theme colour green for Tulu, as directly use traditional red styled cloth for Spring Festival is kinda too artistic disharmony, I choose the style of traditional Chinese ink painting for the main cloth, using same series of colour(grey, black, white, green) and mixed with fluffy feeling yarn clothes. To cooperate with the background of warmly coloured night sky with orange/red lanterns, I choose to keep the design of cloak for Tulu, but change it to a warm red, transparent one. The decoration of scarf is also designed to keep the overall colour harmony. While I use carp and cloud on the scarf to express traditional Spring Festival bless, I use the shape of enemy in the 6th chapter of the game with a carp to design a jade decoration. The inspiration of jade come from its greenish colour, together with a urban myth of the double fish jade wear discovered in an ancient tomb in China. Chinese knot decoration is coloured in green, as I think it may make audience think of other Chinese festivals(it makes me nervous). Cute animal shaped lantern for other related characters appeared with Tulu is the design I apricated mostly. After all, I pay 2 days to design this set of cloth, with consideration of festival theme and characteristic of Tulu. Hope this sketch can remind my audience as the young king enjoyed watching the lantern festival celebration of his old and future country in 2.x! This is Lydia and, thanks for your reading!
